mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the unemployment rate signals tightening labor market conditions that boost corporate profit margins and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE declines by >0.5pp over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and housing starts signals robust supply-side capacity utilization and demand, creating positive momentum in equity markets over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint growth of INDPRO and HOUST fails to produce positive 60d returns in > 50% of cases, or their correlation drops below 0.3 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2.5% triggers central bank rate hikes that increase equity discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns during monetary tightening cycles.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong consumer spending as indicated by rising RSAFS values predicts elevated corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: RSAFS growth fails to correlate with SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.05) over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in nonfarm payrolls signals strong labor market demand that drives corporate investment and positive equity returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS increases by >100k over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Weak GDP growth combined with rising inflation creates stagflationary pressures that depress equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combination of weak GDP and high inflation fails to produce negative 60d returns in > 50% of cases, or their joint effect loses statistical significance (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals improved supply chain efficiency and corporate profitability, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to correlate with SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.05) over any 3-year rolling window.
